name: Curried Chicken Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (14.5 oz.) ready to serve chicken broth
4 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, lightly spoon the flour and level off. Combine the flour with three-quarters of a cup of the broth; blend well. Set aside.
2. In a nonstick Dutch oven or large saucepan, combine the remaining broth, onions, carrots, potatoes, curry powder, and garlic. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add chicken, corn, and peas. Cook over medium-low heat for 5-7 minutes, or until the chicken is no longer pink.
5. Blend in the flour mixture. Cook and stir over medium heat just until bubbly and thickened.
Makes 4 servings—380 calories—35 calories from fat—4 grams fat.
